name: Feedback Loop Rollback Policy
description: Policy defining conditions and procedures for rolling back feedback-driven changes.

trigger_conditions.description: One or more deployment gate conditions are no longer satisfied after an update.
Drift is detected and automatic recalibration fails to resolve it within the configured window.
Exact-match accuracy drops by more than 5% relative to the previous evaluation.

rollback_procedure.description: Retrieve the last evaluation results and configuration that passed all deployment gates.
Replace current evaluation config, feedback policy, and ranking parameters with the last stable versions.
Run evaluation on the restored configuration to confirm gates pass.
Send rollback notification to configured channels.
